title: Who Are You? - Attack on Van Rompuy
description: Farage's infamous attack on EU President Herman Van Rompuy.
transcript: Good morning, Mr Van Rompuy. You've been in office for one year, and in that time the whole edifice is crumbling. I don't want to be rude, but really, you have the charisma of a damp rag and the appearance of a low-grade bank clerk. Who are you? I'd never heard of you.

title: Brexit Victory Speech
description: Farage's triumphant speech declaring victory in the EU referendum.
transcript: Dare to dream that the dawn is breaking on an independent United Kingdom. This will be a victory for real people, a victory for ordinary people, a victory for decent people.

title: You're Not Laughing Now
description: Farage's post-Brexit speech taunting MEPs.
transcript: When I came here 17 years ago and I said that I wanted to lead a campaign to get Britain out of the European Union, you all laughed at me. Well I have to say, you're not laughing now, are you?

title: The Euro Titanic Has Hit the Iceberg
description: Farage's speech during the eurozone crisis.
transcript: The euro Titanic has now hit the iceberg and sadly there simply aren't enough lifeboats.

title: Clacton Victory Speech
description: Farage's speech after winning his Westminster seat.
transcript: This is the inflection point. This is the beginning of the end of the socialist Labour government.

title: Final EU Parliament Speech
description: Farage's emotional final speech before Brexit.
transcript: I know you're going to miss us. I know you want to ban our national flags, but we're going to wave you goodbye.

title: Greek Bailout Speech
description: Farage attacks EU handling of Greek debt crisis.
transcript: Who the hell do you think you people are? You are very, very dangerous people indeed.

title: UKIP Conference Speech
description: Farage's keynote at UKIP's peak.
transcript: The political establishment is losing control. The people want change, and UKIP is the change.

title: Brexit Party Launch
description: Launch of the Brexit Party.
transcript: The politicians have broken their promises. The Brexit Party is here to make sure Brexit happens.

title: Reform UK Conference Speech
description: Farage's first conference as Reform UK leader.
transcript: We are not just a political party. We are a movement to take back our country.

title: Trump Rally Speech
description: Farage speaks at Trump rally in the US.
transcript: What happened in Britain with Brexit is now happening here in America. The people are taking back control.

title: EU Budget Speech
description: Attack on EU spending.
transcript: This organisation is not just incompetent, it's corrupt. And you want more money?

title: Immigration Speech
description: Farage outlines immigration policy.
transcript: We need an Australian-style points system. It works. It's fair. And it puts Britain first.

title: Criticism of Angela Merkel
description: Farage attacks Merkel's refugee policy.
transcript: Mrs Merkel, you have made a catastrophic error. You have opened the door to millions.

title: GB News Show Launch
description: First episode of Farage's GB News show.
transcript: This is a channel for the people. No more metropolitan elite nonsense.

title: Coutts Banking Scandal Statement
description: Farage responds to Coutts debanking.
transcript: This is not about me. This is about the weaponisation of banks against political views.

title: Reform UK Policy Launch
description: Launch of Reform UK's policy platform.
transcript: Lower taxes, controlled immigration, energy independence. This is what Britain needs.

title: Welcoming Suella Braverman
description: Farage welcomes Braverman to Reform UK.
transcript: This is a seismic moment. Suella has come home to the real opposition.

title: Small Boats Speech
description: Farage on Channel crossings.
transcript: This is an invasion. There is no other word for it. And it must stop.

title: Frontbench Announcement
description: Announcing Reform UK's shadow cabinet.
transcript: Today we show Britain that Reform UK is ready for government.

title: Clacton Victory Speech
description: Farage finally wins a Westminster seat after 8 attempts.
keyQuotes: The political establishment should be very worried.

title: Trump Rally Speech
description: Farage speaks at Trump rally shortly before assassination attempt.
keyQuotes: The spirit of Brexit crossed the Atlantic.

title: Reform UK Conference Speech
description: First party conference as elected MP.
keyQuotes: We are the real opposition now.

title: Final GB News Show Before Election
description: Announces return to politics and Reform UK leadership.
keyQuotes: I cannot stand by and watch.

title: Coutts Bank Statement
description: Reveals political motivation behind bank account closure.
keyQuotes: This is about who controls Britain.

title: Im A Celebrity Exit Interview
description: Reflects on time in the jungle after finishing third.
keyQuotes: I showed people the real me.

title: Brexit Party Launch
description: Launches new party to save Brexit.
keyQuotes: If we dont leave on March 29th, I will be back.
The betrayal of Brexit ends here.

title: Leave Means Leave Rally
description: Campaigns against May Chequers deal.

title: UKIP Conference Victory Speech
description: Celebrates European election victory.
keyQuotes: We are now a national party.

title: European Elections Victory Speech
description: UKIP wins national election for first time.

title: South Thanet Concession Speech
description: Concedes defeat and resigns as UKIP leader.

title: Question Time HIV Comments
description: Controversial comments on HIV treatment spark debate.

title: Scottish Referendum Speech
description: Campaigns for Scotland to remain in UK.
keyQuotes: We are better together - but not with the EU.

title: Greek Crisis EU Parliament Speech
description: Attacks EU handling of Greek debt crisis.
keyQuotes: The euro is a complete disaster.

title: Migration Crisis EU Parliament Speech
description: Attacks Merkel open border policy.
keyQuotes: Merkel has made a catastrophic error.
